prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Hearts of Wulin / Jianghu inspired wuxia ink-wash atlas for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major jianghu continents separated by uneven misty seas and narrow straits, with mist-covered mountain peaks, bamboo forest valleys, ancient temple complexes, river market towns, hidden sect strongholds, imperial border roads, sword schools, forbidden manual caves and wandering hero routes.
Style/medium: high-resolution Chinese ink wash atlas, classical landscape painting style, wuxia aesthetic, flowing chi energy trails, soft mineral colors, calligraphic brush textures, poetic martial-world mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the misty sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include subtle compass seal, brushwork border, river routes, temple icons, sect markers and mountain pass symbols without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, misty estuaries, inland lakes and varied landforms; span snowy sacred peaks, temperate riverlands, bamboo forests, deserts, wetlands, tea terraces, karst mountains, lake basins and remote spiritual wastelands.
Avoid: western medieval fantasy, modern satellite image, mirrored continents, bright UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
